---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for the hsr project
title: '[Feature]: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### 1. Goal of the Feature
*Provide a clear description of the goal of this feature. What problem does it solve, and who is it for?*

### 2. User Flow & UI/UX Expectations
*Describe step-by-step how the user will interact with this feature. What buttons do they click? What screens do they see?*

### 3. Detailed Acceptance Criteria
*List the exact items that need to be implemented and verified before this is considered done.*
- [ ] Requirement 1: ...
- [ ] Requirement 2: ...

### 4. Technical Context or References (Optional)
*Are there any specific backend APIs, frontend routes, database collections, or third-party services that should be used or modified?*
- Relevant files/folders: ...
- API details: ...
